meta.note: Compiled from official 2026 posters/programs plus supplementary web research (visitkorcula.eu, visitlumbarda.eu, tzvelaluka.hr, tz-blato.hr, visitorebic-croatia.hr, Jadrolinija). Entries marked verify:true had inconsistent or partially-confirmed source data at compile time — check the linked source before relying on the exact date/time.

events.hr: KUL Kviz za djecu i mlade (7+)
events.en: KUL Quiz for children and youngsters (7+)

desc.en: Korčula's famous 400-year-old sword dance, performed roughly twice a week through the season. Confirmed 2026 dates include 8, 20 & 23 Jul and 3 Aug — check moreska.eu/tickets for the full calendar closer to your visit. Tickets ~€20 adults / €10 children 4–14.
desc.hr: Slavni korčulanski mačevalački ples star 400 godina, izvodi se otprilike dva puta tjedno tijekom sezone. Potvrđeni datumi 2026.: 8., 20. i 23.7. te 3.8. — provjerite moreska.eu/tickets za puni raspored.

ferry_korcula_orebic.hr: Trajekt Dominče (Korčula) ⇄ Orebić, Jadrolinija linija 634 — vozi u OBA SMJERA po istom rasporedu, cijelu godinu. Trajanje plovidbe ~20 min. Ljeti (27.6.–31.8.) polazi cca svakih 30–90 min, od ranog jutra (~5:10) do ponoći, 20+ polazaka dnevno u svakom smjeru — jednako često Korčula→Orebić kao i Orebić→Korčula. Trajektni pristan Dominče udaljen je ~2 km od starog grada Korčule (25 min hoda ili taxi); u Orebiću trajekt pristaje u samom mjestu. Karte na shop.jadrolinija.hr ili na licu mjesta (vrijede za bilo koji polazak tog dana, ne za točno vrijeme).
ferry_korcula_orebic.en: Dominče (Korčula) ⇄ Orebić car & passenger ferry, Jadrolinija line 634 — runs in BOTH DIRECTIONS on the same year-round schedule. Crossing takes ~20 minutes. In peak season (27 Jun–31 Aug) departures run roughly every 30–90 minutes from ~05:10 to midnight, 20+ sailings per day each way — just as frequent Orebić→Korčula as Korčula→Orebić. The Dominče ferry port is about 2 km from Korčula Old Town (~25 min walk, or a short taxi ride); in Orebić the ferry docks right in town. Tickets: shop.jadrolinija.hr or on-site (valid for any sailing that day, not a fixed departure time) — so if you're staying on the Korčula side and want to catch an evening event in Orebić, or you're on Pelješac and want to come over for something in Korčula, you can pick whichever crossing suits and return on a later one.
ferry_korcula_orebic.de: Fähre Dominče (Korčula) ⇄ Orebić, Jadrolinija Linie 634 — verkehrt ganzjährig in BEIDE RICHTUNGEN nach demselben Fahrplan. Überfahrt ca. 20 Minuten. In der Hauptsaison (27. Juni–31. Aug.) alle 30–90 Minuten, von ca. 5:10 Uhr bis Mitternacht, 20+ Fahrten pro Tag je Richtung — ebenso häufig von Orebić nach Korčula wie umgekehrt.
ferry_korcula_orebic.it: Traghetto Dominče (Curzola) ⇄ Orebić, linea Jadrolinija 634 — attivo tutto l'anno in ENTRAMBE LE DIREZIONI con lo stesso orario. Traversata di circa 20 minuti. In alta stagione (27 giu–31 ago) partenze ogni 30–90 minuti circa, dalle 5:10 a mezzanotte, 20+ corse al giorno per direzione — altrettanto frequenti da Orebić a Curzola quanto il contrario.
ferry_korcula_orebic.sl: Trajekt Dominče (Korčula) ⇄ Orebić, linija Jadrolinija 634 — vozi vse leto V OBE SMERI po istem urniku. Prevoz traja pribl. 20 minut. V vrhuncu sezone (27. jun.–31. avg.) odhodi vsakih 30–90 minut, od pribl. 5.10 do polnoči, 20+ voženj dnevno v vsako smer — enako pogosto iz Orebića na Korčulo kot obratno.
ferry_korcula_orebic.fr: Ferry Dominče (Korčula) ⇄ Orebić, ligne Jadrolinija 634 — circule toute l'année dans LES DEUX SENS selon le même horaire. Traversée d'environ 20 minutes. En haute saison (27 juin–31 août), départs toutes les 30 à 90 minutes environ, de 5h10 à minuit, 20+ traversées par jour dans chaque sens — aussi fréquent d'Orebić vers Korčula que l'inverse.
